title: englerastrum melanocarpum
intro: Englerastrum melanocarpum is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Englerastrum melanocarpum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is often used in traditional medicine in its raw form or in the form of a decoction.
